name: NMFC Freight Classes by Density
description: LTL freight class bands derived from shipment density (lb/ft^3). NOT in the knowledge base; the corpus references NMFC classification but contains no class table. Candidate density breaks below approximate the standard 18-class scale and MUST be confirmed against NMFTA ClassIT / NMFC.
review_frequency: annually (NMFTA updates; some commodities are class-fixed, not density-based)
source: TO CONFIRM: NMFTA National Motor Freight Classification (NMFC) / ClassIT.
sourcing_notes: Density-based class is only a default; many commodities have a fixed NMFC class regardless of density, and some use density-based classification tiers. Confirm the exact density breakpoints and the 18-class list (50, 55, 60, 65, 70, 77.5, 85, 92.5, 100, 110, 125, 150, 175, 200, 250, 300, 400, 500). Label output as an estimate; advise users to confirm the commodity's actual NMFC item.
